_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Collaborate with data owners to establish data quality rules and definitions.
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of data quality management program design, including profiling methodology, rule authoring standards, threshold setting, issue classification, and escalation path design.
comments: DCWF task equal WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-K-005 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-K-021 (DQ, cosine: 0.677), DQ-S-003 (DQ, cosine: 0.675).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.0/10 (raw 0.597). Shared vocabulary: [data, quality]. DCWF-only terms [collaborate, definitions, establish, owners, rules] vs WIDAI-only terms [authoring, classification, design, escalation, issue, knowledge] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.880 (P=0.890, R=0.871). Balanced P/R — the 11-word DCWF element and 21-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.7%). "Collaborate with data owners to establish data quality rules and definitions." and "Knowledge of data quality management program design, including profiling methodo" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.703 > STS 0.597 (gap +0.105). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [data, quality] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.1%. Shared tokens: [data, quality]. DCWF-only: [collaborate, definitions, establish, owners, rules]. WIDAI-only: [authoring, classification, design, escalation, issue, knowledge].

signals.detail: STS 0.597 classified as Equal but closer to Superset threshold. Classification may be over-generous.
